title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tanishq - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tanishq - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Tanishq in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
